commands.name: sign
commands.description: Signs NuGet packages with the specified Key Vault certificate.

options.name: --output
options.description: The output file. If omitted, overwrites input.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrites a signature if it exists.

options.name: --file-digest
options.description: The digest algorithm to hash the file with. Default option is sha256

options.name: --timestamp-rfc3161
options.description: Specifies the RFC 3161 timestamp server's URL. If this option (or -t) is not specified, the signed file will not be timestamped.

options.name: --timestamp-digest
options.description: Used with the -tr switch to request a digest algorithm used by the RFC 3161 timestamp server. Default option is sha256

options.name: --signature-type
options.description: The signature type (omit for author, default. Only author is supported currently).

options.name: --v3-service-index-url
options.description: Specifies V3 Service Index Url. Required if SignatureType is Repository

options.name: --package-owner
options.description: Package Owners. Required if SignatureType is Repository

options.name: --azure-key-vault-url
options.description: The URL to an Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-client-id
options.description: The Client ID to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-client-secret
options.description: The Client Secret to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-tenant-id
options.description: The Tenant Id to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-certificate
options.description: The name of the certificate in Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-accesstoken
options.description: The Access Token to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-managed-identity
options.description: Use a Managed Identity to access Azure Key Vault.

commands.name: verify
commands.description:
Verifies NuGet packages are signed correctly
Use " [command] --help" for more information about a command.
